titleStmt.title: SII 27.193: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 193. (A.R. No. 540 of 1929-30.) BAINDŪRU, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built into the compound wall of a private house near the Śayanēśvara temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1482, Siddhārthi, Vaiśākha śu. 15, the given tithi corresponding to 1559 A.D., April 21, the Śaka year being current. The details are not verifiable.

It records a gift of tax-free land by Sēnabōva-seṭṭi, son of Baḷiseṭṭi, the seṭigāra of Chārabaḷi, to the maṭha caused to be constructed by him to the west of the Sēnēśvara temple. It states that mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chenna-Bayirādēvi was governing Baidūru and other areas from her capital at Saṅgītapura.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrī sarasva
tyainamaḥ . śrī gurubhyō . namaḥ namastu
ṁga śirastuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē . trayi
lōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁ
bhavē . śrīmadrājādhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīra
pratapa śrī sadāśivarāya mahārāyara
rājyābhyudayadalli śrī manmahāmaṁḍalēśva
raru cennabayirādēvi Aṁmanavaru saṁgī
tapuravararāda saṁdharmakātaprasaṁgavi
ddu bayiduru muttada samasta rājya
vanu pratipālisuttaṁ dina sālivāhana
sakavarusa 1482 neya siṁdhārti saṁtsa
rada vaiśā suda 15 lu śrīmatu ba
ḷiseṭiyamaga caurabaḷiya seṭigāra
sēnabōva seṭṭiyu barisida dharma
sasanada bage kramaveṁteṁdare nānu śēnē
śvaradēvālayada paḍuvadikkina kaṭisida ma
ṭake bareda bāḷina vivara bayidūra vo
ḷage Ariya baḷiyavarā kayyali mū
lava koṁḍu guḍeya maneya saruva
sada voḷage navage baṁda haluva
dāmala gaṁde hane 40 ralekka

dalu muḍi 3 mataṁ goḷa
laḍi gaṁḍe māna Usaru
ne 7 Anagaṁḍe mataṁ koṇigade
bāḷinalu sahavāgi hane 60 nema
ṁtaṁ hoḍasalagaṁḍe vaḍi 2
ke ha 70 nalu vaṁdamuḍi 8 ma
ḍi gaṁḍe mataṁ bāsana guḍi hitilu
sātavaṇinalu vaḍa mu 2¢
ṁ yigade kaṭida gēṇi Akki mu 9 hitti
lige kaṭida gēṇi ga . haṇa 7 yega
gadege Aramanege teru ga . 6 . mataṁseṭima
neyasaruvasake kaṭidagēṇi kaṁjihā 40
lekkadalu muḍi 20 matayiI saruvake pa
ṁgavanu biṭeveṁdu halaru koṭa
kaṭunu dhanaunettiyamaneyalu
Uṭāyi basanagadeyanu kogali
nāruva kayali mūlavakoṁḍa sadhana
gēṇi Akkimu 9 kke maṭada gāvalige
muḍi 6 dēvapujake mu 3 muvara
bramaṇa jana dina 1 ke 3 valige va
rusa voṁdake mu 18 mata raba
ḍi Ā Ulige biṭa baḷu halaru mula
ke biṭa baḷu sena bhōseṭi Agada paḍuvaṇa
kaṭe hāne 20 mataṁ madhastara kāyyali
Aruvarava maḍi koṁḍa baḷuyeḍa
takkare voḷage mane bagila gade hane 30 ne
yi dharmavanu nanagattana paraṁ
pariyali naḍibaharu yi dharma
Aru tiṁdare kāsi vāraṇāsi
yali kayilayaṁ
koṁdavaru
Digital edition of SII 27.193 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
